action.reasoning: Observation: the 2-epoch DINOv2 pilot achieved much higher source-val accuracy (~0.722 with flip) than ResNet, but source-val has only weak correlation with Quickdraw and the run took ~45 minutes. Analysis: this is still the most promising new direction we have; a direct eval is needed before committing more training time. Since predict.py already supports backbone-aware loading and flip TTA helped previously, the highest-value next step is to submit the DINOv2 pilot checkpoint as-is to measure true Quickdraw transfer. Decision: submit eval on checkpoints/dinov2_pilot/best.pt with the current predict.py.
